hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.env.example|*.env.sample|*.env.template|*.env.dist) exit 0;; *.env|*.env.*|*.pem|*.key|*.cert|*.crt|*.p12|*.pfx|*/credentials|*/credentials.json|*/.netrc) echo "🚫 Blocked write to secret/credential file: $f" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0
